mapper.sql: select link_id, basis_type, basis_id, chapter_id, article_id, create_by, create_time from sys_basis_chapter_link
mapper.select: SELECT lb.basis_id as basisId, lb.basis_no as basisNo, lb.title as title, lb.violation_type as violationType, lb.issuing_authority as issuingAuthority, lb.effective_date as effectiveDate, lb.legal_level as legalLevel, lb.clauses as clauses, lb.legal_liability as legalLiability, lb.discretion_standard as discretionStandard FROM sys_legal_basis lb INNER JOIN sys_basis_chapter_link bcl ON lb.basis_id = bcl.basis_id WHERE bcl.article_id = #{articleId} AND bcl.basis_type = 'legal' AND lb.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY lb.basis_no ASC

SELECT pb.basis_id as basisId, pb.basis_no as basisNo, pb.title as title, pb.violation_type as violationType, pb.issuing_authority as issuingAuthority, pb.effective_date as effectiveDate, pb.legal_level as legalLevel, pb.clauses as clauses, pb.legal_liability as legalLiability, pb.discretion_standard as discretionStandard FROM sys_processing_basis pb INNER JOIN sys_basis_chapter_link bcl ON pb.basis_id = bcl.basis_id WHERE bcl.article_id = #{articleId} AND bcl.basis_type = 'processing' AND pb.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY pb.basis_no ASC
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_basis_chapter_link
basis_type, basis_id, chapter_id, article_id, create_by, create_time,
#{basisType}, #{basisId}, #{chapterId}, #{articleId}, #{createBy}, #{createTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_basis_chapter_link where link_id in
#{linkId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.chapter_id as chapterId, c.chapter_no as chapterNo, c.chapter_title as chapterTitle, a.article_id as articleId, a.article_no as articleNo, a.content as content, COALESCE(lb.legal_count, 0) as legalBasisCount, COALESCE(pb.processing_count, 0) as processingBasisCount FROM sys_regulation_chapter c INNER JOIN sys_regulation_article a ON c.chapter_id = a.chapter_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT article_id, COUNT(*) as legal_count FROM sys_basis_chapter_link WHERE basis_type = 'legal' AND article_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY article_id ) lb ON a.article_id = lb.article_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT article_id, COUNT(*) as processing_count FROM sys_basis_chapter_link WHERE basis_type = 'processing' AND article_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY article_id ) pb ON a.article_id = pb.article_id WHERE c.regulation_id = #{regulationId} ORDER BY c.chapter_no ASC, a.article_no ASC
